content.full_text:
Oct 90

THE SONOMA COUNTY GRAND JURY
600 ADMINISTRATION DRIVE • SANTA ROSA • CALIFORNIA 95403 • (707) 527-1160

October 4, 1990

California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Attention: Legal Division

Requesting opinion as to whether or not conflict
of interest is present.

Benjamin Tuxhorn is a member of the City of Santa Rosa
Planning Commission. As stated on latest Form 721
(attachment 3) he is also President of B-T Land Development
and a limited interest partner in Benjamin Tuxhorn &
Associates, a firm whose general description of business
activity is "construction".

According to the above mentioned Form 721, B-T Land
Development owns or has options on 63 m/l acres and Benjamin
Tuxhorn & Associates has options on 43 m/l acres in area
southwest of Santa Rosa (attachment 1). This area is
outside Santa Rosa city limits but within LAFCO "sphere of
influence" and ultimate city boundary (attachment 2).

The Planning Commission is currently engaged in the
consideration, revision, and recommendation to the City
Council of a draft General Plan. This document addresses,
among other items, what should be the ultimate city
boundary, rezoning of property within city limits including
areas in close proximity to parcels in which Mr. Tuxhorn has
a stated interest, limitations on number of new residential
units to be permitted each year under a proposed growth
management plan, and distribution of allotted permits for
new residential construction under that plan.

We would appreciate an opinion on what constitutes a
conflict of interest for this individual on matters before
the Planning Commission, in particular their discussions on
the draft General Plan.  Also, under what conditions is it
necessary for him to abstain from taking part in Planning
Commission matters including those involving the draft
General Plan.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        [signature]
                                        John E. Sill
                                        Foreman, 1990 Grand Jury


JE:bb
Attachments
1.  List of parcels outside city limits in which
    Mr. Tuxhorn has an interest.
2.  Section of map showing location of these parcels.
3.  Mr. Tuxhorn's 1989-90 Form 721.

-----------        ----------------       -------    --------------------------------  ----------------------------------

                                                                                          "Hearn Acres"

043 200 04        None                    17         "              "                    "        "

134 04 38         Not Shown               23.52      Not Shown                          

134 300 18        1810 Hearn Av           2.7        Rodriguiz, Corene T., et al        B-T Land Development    Option
                                                                                          "Rodriguiz/Bessone

134 300 19        None                    2.5        "     "                            "      "

134 300 20        None                    2.5        "     "                            "      "

134 300 21        None                    2.5        "     "                            "      "

134 300 22        None                    2.5        "     "                            "      "

043 111 07        2903 S. Dutton          5.7        Cherniss, Joel W. & Fred B.        B-T Land Development    Option
                                                                                          "Cherniss"

043 071 07        2634 Dutton             8          McGill, Stephanie A.               B-T Land Development    Option
                                                                                          "McGill"

134 042 05        None                    11.85      Tivo, David J.                     B-T Land Development    Option
                                                                                          "Tivo"

134 040 230       Not Shown               5          Not Shown                          B-T Land Development    Option
                                                                                          "Winston"

134 290 010       Not Shown               .5         Not Shown                          B-T Land Development    Option
                                                                                          "Winston"

134 042 22        2780 Stony Point Rd 10                Bradford, Donald B. & Sylvia P.    B-T Land Development    Option
                                                                                          "Bradford"

134 042 3         S. Dutton Av            1          B-T Land Development, Inc.         Ownership
                                                                                          "Morrison"

134 042 4         Bellevue Rd             8.55       B-T Land Development, Inc.         Ownership
                                                                                          "Manuni"

# Transcription of Visible Text Elements:

**Blue boxes (left to right, top to bottom):**
- 10+11-87
- 50-2/40-87 | 82-2/40-87
- 40-2/40-87 | 24-2/40-87
- 35-10-87
- A0-11+E0
- Z-L0-87

**Blue dashed outline:**
A0-11+E0

**Red/Maroon text and bars (top section):**
[illegible text with "SUMMIT" and other partially visible markings]
- 52(L)77 [illegible]
- 52(L)77 1Z/1/4

**Hatched areas labels:**
Wd
[Various hatching patterns in teal/green throughout]

**Bottom section text:**
SHERIDAN
SCHOOL
[illegible text]

**Cardinal direction:**
N (with arrow pointing upward)

**Note:** Much of the text throughout the document is illegible due to image quality, handwriting, and overlapping technical drawings. The above represents the clearly readable text elements visible in the image.

I can see this image appears to be a very faint or low-contrast document with minimal visible text. The majority of the page is blank or nearly white, with only scattered blue dots or marks visible in various locations throughout the page. There are no clearly legible words or text content that I can reliably transcribe with confidence.
